name: Festive Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup canned water chestnuts, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced celery, water chestnuts, and peas in a saucepan.
2. Place over medium heat and heat through.
3. Toss with the steamed rice and season to taste with salt and pepper.
Makes 8 servings.
Each serving contains about: 396 calories; 117 mg sodium; 8 mg cholesterol; 3 grams fat; 81 grams carbohydrates; 9 grams protein; 1 gram fiber.
